content.cn_text: 第四部分。您将听到一个关于图形符号研究的讲座。首先，您有
content.en_text: section 4. You will hear a talk on the research of the graphical symbol. First, you have

content.cn_text: 一些时间查看问题31至40。
content.en_text: some time to look at questions 31 to 40.

content.cn_text: 大家早上好。今天我将谈论图形符号。图形符号
content.en_text: Good morning everyone. Today I'm going to talk about the graphical symbol. A graphic symbol

content.cn_text: 是一种用于表示语言的书写符号，例如希腊字母中使用的那些。
content.en_text: is a written symbol that is used to represent speech, such as those used in the Greek alphabet.

content.cn_text: 图形符号一词涵盖了从埃及象形文字中使用的语标
content.en_text: The term graphic symbol encompasses anything from the logographs used in Egyptian hieroglyphic

content.cn_text: 到古代中国的象形文字的一切。早期的符号基于象形文字和表意文字，
content.en_text: writing to ancient Chinese pictograms. Early symbols were based on pictographs and ideograms

content.cn_text: 然后发展成语标书写系统。这些系统在一些
content.en_text: before they were developed into logographic writing systems. These systems are still in use in some

content.cn_text: 非洲、美洲和大洋洲的非文字文化中仍然在使用。事实上，象形文字的元素
content.en_text: non literate cultures in Africa, the Americas and Oceania. Indeed, elements of pictography are

content.cn_text: 仍然存在于现代汉字中，追溯一些汉字的起源通常是一个有趣的练习。
content.en_text: still found in modern Chinese characters, and it is often an interesting exercise to trace the

content.cn_text: 象形文字至今仍广泛应用于商业用途，作为标志、 商业用途，作为标志、
content.en_text: origins of some Chinese characters. Pictographs remain in common commercial use today as signs,

content.cn_text: 说明或统计图表。路标和公共厕所标志，甚至平板包装
content.en_text: instructions, or statistical diagrams. Road signs and public toilet signs and even flat pack

content.cn_text: 利用图片的组装说明都被认为是象形文字。古代的图形
content.en_text: assembly instructions utilizing pictures are considered pictographic. Ancient graphic

content.cn_text: 书写系统为研究人员提供了关于过去文明的丰富知识。
content.en_text: writing systems provide researchers with a wealth of knowledge about past civilizations.

content.cn_text: 1799年，拿破仑埃及远征队的成员偶然发现了一块
content.en_text: In 1799, one of the most important historical discoveries was made by accident when members of

content.cn_text: 在罗塞塔发现了一块刻有三种不同文字的石头，这成为最重要的历史发现之一。
content.en_text: Napoleon's expedition to Egypt found a stone in Rosetta that exhibited three different scripts.

content.cn_text: 这块石头，现在被称为罗塞塔石碑，受到了学者们的深入研究，
content.en_text: The stone, now known as the Rosetta stone, was studied in significant depth by scholars

content.cn_text: 并于1822年由法国人让-弗朗索瓦·商博良首次破译。
content.en_text: and was first deciphered by Frenchman Jean-François Champolion in 1822.

content.cn_text: 他能够正确确定符号的语音值，后来的研究
content.en_text: He was able to correctly determine the phonetic values of the symbols, and later research

content.cn_text: 证实了他的发现。在许多这些符号中，线条被用来描绘多种
content.en_text: has confirmed his findings. In many of these symbols, lines are used to portray a multitude of

content.cn_text: 含义，对这些线条的知识和理解是理解图形
content.en_text: meanings and knowledge and understanding of these lines holds the key to comprehension of graphic

content.cn_text: 书写系统的关键。通信史上一个关键时刻是暗箱或照相机的发明。
content.en_text: writing systems. A key moment in the history of communication was the invention of the camera obscure or camera

content.cn_text: 暗箱或照相机。尽管这个概念可以追溯到公元前5世纪的中国
content.en_text: obscure or camera. Although the concept can be traced back to the 5th century BC Chinese

content.cn_text: 哲学家墨子，但第一张摄影图像最终是由约瑟夫在1826年创作的，
content.en_text: philosopher Moarty, the first photographic image was ultimately created in 1826 by Joseph

content.cn_text: 尼斯福尔·尼埃普斯。后来被称为摄影的技术，使研究人员能够拼凑并
content.en_text: Nissefor, Nissef. Photography, as it was later known, enables researchers to piece together

content.cn_text: 更好地理解历史。如今，摄影已成为日常生活中重要的一部分，大多数
content.en_text: and better understand history. Today, photography forms a huge part of everyday life and most

content.cn_text: 出版物都包含大量的照片。摄影被用于广告，现在也
content.en_text: publications contain a vast number of photographs. Photography is used in advertising and is now

content.cn_text: 正成为提高人们对现有世界问题认识的一种方式。例如，动物福利慈善机构
content.en_text: becoming a way to increase awareness of existing world issues. For example, animal welfare charities

content.cn_text: 越来越多地利用摄影来宣传那些濒临灭绝的动物。
content.en_text: are increasingly using photography to advertise animals that are at high risk of endangerment.

content.cn_text: 慈善工作者有时会被派往遥远的地方，记录高危动物所遭受的痛苦，
content.en_text: Charity workers are sometimes flown to far-flung locations to document the suffering endured

content.cn_text: 试图提高人类对其消费活动的意识，
content.en_text: by high-risk animals in an attempt to raise human awareness of their consumption activities,

content.cn_text: 以及这些活动如何影响其他物种。最近一项备受瞩目的活动是，将一台相机绑在
content.en_text: and how they impact others. One recent high-profile campaign was undertaken by attaching a camera

content.cn_text: 鸟的脚上，以获取动物在其自然栖息地中的照片，
content.en_text: to the foot of a bird in order to obtain photographs of the animals in their natural habitats

content.cn_text: 并了解它们与人类垃圾接触的频率。
content.en_text: and understand how often they come into contact with human waste.

content.cn_text: 一部即将上映的关于中途岛动物苦难的纪录片，
content.en_text: As soon to be released documentary about the suffering of animals on Midway Island,

content.cn_text: 展示了人类消费对数千英里之外的动物造成伤害的全部程度。
content.en_text: shows the full extent to which human consumption is harming animals thousands of miles away from us.

content.cn_text: 随着摄影技术的不断进步，无人机的使用现已变得司空见惯，
content.en_text: As photography continues to progress, with the use of drones now becoming somewhat commonplace,

content.cn_text: 我们应该期待未来会有越来越多的物体被纳入其中，
content.en_text: we should expect more and more objects to be included in the future,

content.cn_text: 进一步拓展摄影的视野。事实上，传统媒体价格的下降压力
content.en_text: expanding the horizon of photography ever further. Indeed, the downward pressure on traditional

content.cn_text: 意味着媒体公司被迫在如何盈利方面发挥创意。
content.en_text: media prices means that media companies are being forced to get creative on how to make a profit.

content.cn_text: 许多公司发现解决之道在于广告，现在公司愿意
content.en_text: Many have found that the answer to this lies in advertising, and companies are now willing

content.cn_text: 将其预算的很大一部分用于在报纸上做广告。
content.en_text: to devote a large portion of their budgets to advertising in newspapers.

content.cn_text: 同样地，营销已成为公司商业模式中不可或缺的一部分，
content.en_text: By the same token, marketing has become an essential part of a company's business model,

content.cn_text: 往往意味着公司的成败。因此，大量时间和金钱已投入到
content.en_text: often meaning the success or failure of a company. As a result, much time and money has been

content.cn_text: 有效品牌建设的开发中，而有吸引力的包装在其中发挥着重要作用。
content.en_text: pumped into the development of effective branding, with attractive packaging playing a large role in

content.cn_text: 这一点。然而，许多政府现在被认为正在打击营销和包装，
content.en_text: this. However, many governments are now seen to be cracking down on marketing and packaging

content.cn_text: 以试图保护消费者免受误导。特别是烟草公司现在
content.en_text: in an attempt to protect consumers from being misled. In particular, tobacco companies are now

content.cn_text: 受到日益严格的监管。例如，在英国，立法即将通过，
content.en_text: subject to ever increasing regulation. For example, in the United Kingdom, legislation is soon

content.cn_text: 以阻止香烟包装上的任何形式的品牌或差异化，
content.en_text: to pass preventing any form of branding or differentiation on cigarette packaging,

content.cn_text: 以遏制吸烟的有害影响。最后，我们绝不能忘记图形书写系统在
content.en_text: in efforts to curb the harmful effects of smoking. Finally, one must not forget the fundamental

content.cn_text: 数学中所扮演的基本角色。图表、图标和示意图
content.en_text: role that graphic writing systems have had to play in mathematics. Graphs, icons, and diagrams

content.cn_text: 通常构成这些学术分支的基础。事实上，只需看看
content.en_text: often form the very basis of these branches of academia. Indeed, one needs to look no further

content.cn_text: 化学的元素周期表，就能看到当今图形书写系统使用的完美例子。
content.en_text: than chemistry's periodic table to see a perfect example of graphic writing systems in use today.

content.cn_text: 第四部分到此结束。您现在有半分钟时间检查您的答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 4. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 听力考试到此结束。在雅思考试中，您现在将有10分钟时间将您的答案填写到答题纸上。
content.en_text: That is the end of the listening test. In the IELTS test, you will now have 10 minutes to transfer your answers to the answer sheet.
